title: PIT pilot sleeve replay
summary: Add --include-pilot-sleeve to quant/backtester.py so AI_INFRA_PILOT can be replayed point-in-time without changing default core-only backtests.
acceptance: Pilot data universe is preloaded only from point-in-time trade-enabled records as of the backtest end date.
Backtester stores counterfactual snapshots/outcomes in memory and does not write data/pilot_competition_decisions.jsonl.
Canonical pre-2026-05-01 windows show zero pilot entries and unchanged core metrics with the flag enabled.

verification.tests: python -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider quant/test_backtester_pilot_sleeve.py quant/test_pilot_sleeve.py quant/test_candidate_competition_logger.py quant/test_universe_manager.py quant/test_universe_adapter.py
verification.three_window_result: core-only metrics matched include-pilot-sleeve metrics; pilot entries were 0 in late_strong, mid_weak, and old_thin

next_step: Run post-2026-05-01 replay or forward daily runs to accumulate direct pilot PnL, replacement value, and risk-adjusted replacement value.
